channel.title: Technology on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: ereading
item.description: Got myself one of these Kobo Clara HD eReaders a wee while back. Very impressed. Much better to read on than a mobile phone. More portable than a tablet. Lots of eBooks available from Kobo. But I can also read eBooks from Google and Amazon on it. So that’s great if you don’t want to be tied to a particular ecosystem. There’s also the option to borrow books from your local library using OverDrive.
